title: Give Option to Suppress Automation Spamming of "Updates" Thread
excerpt:

We have a simple automation in place to send a notification email when a task is assigned to a user.   It works great, but the notification also places an entry in the “Updates” thread for every email sent.   We’re …

posts.author: cpernicano (Chris Pernicano)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We have a simple automation in place to send a notification email when a task is assigned to a user. It works great, but the notification also places an entry in the “Updates” thread for every email sent. We’re having conversations in that thread and are constantly having to filter through the “Email Sent” spam that is coming from the notifications. I propose either of two solutions:

  1. Put system notifications into a separate thread under a separate tab.
  2. Give an option on the automation to suppress the entries in the “updates” thread.

Thanks,
Chris

posts.author: SeanM (Sean)
posts.cookedHtml:
I back this feature request completely.

Having an option to either surpress the update creation

or

Having the Email notifications logged in a separate item tab.
